prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: The Neighbor Who Babysat Too Much
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Menace Christmas
Tagline: Where every secret comes home.
Theme: A town never forgets. It just redecorates.
Omen: a Christmas ornament turning up wet
Relationship dynamic: woman falsely accusing lovable scamp
Props: unopened letter, snow globe, boat key

Cast:
- Evelyn Winterson | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=lawyer | threat_aura=0.42 | space=old family office described as retreat supplies | secrets=buried one traumatic detail under work for years
- Daniel Mercer | archetype=rugged_scamp | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=widowed boat mechanic | threat_aura=0.39 | space=old family office described as just storage | secrets=knows more about the vineyard fire than he admits
- Wyatt Pike | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=salon owner | threat_aura=0.42 | space=meditation annex nobody uses in winter | secrets=may die first or survive unbelievably; once hid a casserole dish containing evidence
- Daniel Hawthorne | archetype=mysterious_elegant_woman | role=elegant_wildcard | job=widow with a foundation | threat_aura=0.69 | space=storage unit described as seasonal materials | secrets=had brunch with someone officially deceased
- Noah Pike | archetype=soft_spoken_menace | role=secondary_male_pressure | job=sommelier with unusual patience | threat_aura=0.87 | space=dock office with a desk nobody fully claims | secrets=rehearsed his alibi before anyone asked; has a second phone labeled as a work precaution
- Derek Sutton | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=local podcaster | threat_aura=0.43 | space=old storm shelter from before the divorce | secrets=accused an innocent scamp and feels sick about it
- Jenna Hawthorne | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Jenna Dane | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Emotional exposition arrives on schedule with insanity multiplier 2.58. A basement light switches on in an empty house.

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Daniel Mercer is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Evelyn Winterson says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Alder Ridge.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Daniel?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Jenna. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Evelyn. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The unopened letter is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Daniel."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."

Write an expansion JSON object with exactly these keys:
- expanded_synopsis: string, 180-320 words
- scene_paragraphs: array of 6 strings, each 90-180 words, representing juicy HallTime scene expansion
- dialogue_lines: array of 14 strings, each almost-human HallTime dialogue
